title: WorldWeaver Neoforge
description: An unofficial port of the BetterX team utility mod for NeoForge loader that aims to streamline common modding tasks, especially those related to world creation
body:
**WorldWeaver (Unofficial NeoForge Port)**

This project is an **unofficial port** of WorldWeaver to **NeoForge**.
It exists to make mods that depend on WorldWeaver available on NeoForge for modern Minecraft versions.
NeoForge only (not Fabric / not Forge).

**What this project does**

Provides the WorldWeaver library on NeoForge (a dependency/utility library used by other mods).
The goal is to keep functionality as close to upstream as possible, with only porting/compatibility changes where required.

**Why download it**

Download this only if a mod/modpack requires WorldWeaver on NeoForge.
WorldWeaver is a library and typically does not add standalone gameplay content on its own.
Required on: both client and server.

**How this project differs from the original**

- Loader/platform: NeoForge (upstream is Fabric)
- Goal: compatibility for Minecraft on NeoForge
- Scope: upstream-accurate behavior where possible; compatibility fixes when needed

**Credits / Attribution**

All artwork and the majority of the code belong to the developers of the original library: the BetterX Team.

**Original project (upstream)**

WorldWeaver (Fabric) by the BetterX Team (Modrinth): https://modrinth.com/mod/worldweaver

Upstream source (GitHub): https://github.com/quiqueck/WorldWeaver

**Support / Issue reports**

This is an **unofficial NeoForge port**. Please **do not report** issues to the official BetterX Team Discord or GitHub, as they do not maintain this port.

For bugs and support related to this NeoForge version, please use this port’s GitHub issue tracker: https://github.com/Reijin2312/WorldWeaver_Neoforge

If any issues caused by this port affect the upstream community, please contact me directly.

BetterX Discord (upstream community): https://discord.com/invite/kYuATbYbKW
